description: LSM303DLHC 3-Axis Accelerometer + 3-Axis Magnetometer — Standard Test Vectors for Renode I2C Emulation

harness.read_raw: lsm303dlhc_accel_read_raw(&g_dev, &_a); if (_a.x != 0) raw = (int32_t)_a.x; else if (_a.y != 0) raw = (int32_t)_a.y; else raw = (int32_t)_a.z

special_behavior.auto_increment: Both 0x19 and 0x1E use auto-increment addressing: bit7 of sub-address is the auto-increment flag and is masked off (addr & 0x7F) before register lookup.

0x28.name: accel_data
0x28.description: OUT_X_L..OUT_Z_H (6 bytes, auto-increment from 0xA8→0x28): X=0x0010=16, Y=0x0020=32, Z=0x4000=16384

0x03.name: mag_data
0x03.description: OUT_X_H..OUT_Z_L (6 bytes, X-Z-Y order per datasheet): X=0x00F0=240, Z=0x0010=16, Y=0x0080=128

steps.description: Call lsm303dlhc_init(). Reads WHO_AM_I_A (0x33) and ident registers (H, 4, 3). Configures accel and mag. Expect return 0.
Call lsm303dlhc_read_accel(&ax, &ay, &az). Reads 6 bytes from 0xA8 (auto-increment). Expect return 0.
Call lsm303dlhc_read_mag(&mx, &my, &mz). Reads 6 bytes from 0x03. Expect return 0.
Verify first logged value in expected range. Typically accel X raw (16) or scaled value.

default.raw_value_description: First non-zero accel axis (int16). Full range ±32768.

rtthread.raw_value_description: Harness reads accel struct and reports first non-zero axis as raw int16. Range covers full 12-bit high-resolution signed accel ±2047 LSB.

details.description: First output value in expected range

required_writes.description: Accel data burst read at OUT_X_L (0x28), typically with auto-increment bit 7 set (so register pointer byte is 0xA8). This is the ONE write that any accel-axis read must issue; other init writes (WHO_AM_I probe, CTRL_REG1 config, mag-side init) are implementation-dependent and NOT required for a minimal read_accel call.

runtime_tests.name: accel_mag_identity
runtime_tests.note: Accel @0x19 snapshot: WHO_AM_I_A=0x33, CTRL_REG1_A=0x07, OUT_X..Z = 16/32/16384. This vector currently only populates the accel slave; the mag slave (0x1E) is declared via aux_i2c_addrs for the consistency checker but is not yet attached in the .resc template. Driver-visible read_raw may be any axis value, so no expected.raw is asserted.

runtime_tests.name: zero_g_all_axes
runtime_tests.note: All three axes zero (free fall / no gravity). Baseline.

runtime_tests.name: pos_1g_x_axis
runtime_tests.note: X axis = +1g (~16384 at +/-2g scale, 16-bit left-aligned). Y/Z zero.

runtime_tests.name: full_scale_positive
runtime_tests.note: All axes near +full-scale (12-bit max left-aligned). Saturation upper edge.

runtime_tests.name: full_scale_negative
runtime_tests.note: All axes near -full-scale. Saturation lower edge.
